text:
8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the DE Managed Care Supplemental file; we obtain the maximum 
value (number of months) from the following variables: 

• Mental Health (MH) Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) Months 
• MH Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 
• Substance Use Disorders (SUD) PIHP Months 
• SUD PAHP Months 

(Variables called MH_PIHP_MOS, MH_PAHP_MOS, SUD_PIHP_MOS,
